ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test executed */,
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coverage metric */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the step in the testing process */,
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the distribution index */,
  "cpu_time" REAL /* CPU time used by the test in seconds */,
  "max_memory" REAL /* Maximum memory usage by the test in MB */,
  "time_taken" REAL /* Time taken to execute the test in seconds */,
  "max_swap" INTEGER /* Maximum swap usage by the test in KB */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the test execution */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the test execution */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test execution (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the test execution failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_coverage_id FOREIGN KEY ("coverage_id") REFERENCES coverage ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES steps ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_distribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("distribution_id") REFERENCES distributions ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the software version being tested */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the test (e.g., unit, integration, system) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the test (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coverage" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coverage metric */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of code covered by the test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the coverage */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used to measure coverage (e.g., statement, branch, function) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step */,
  "step_name" TEXT /* Name of the step */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the step */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the step in the testing process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution index */,
  "index" INTEGER /* Index value representing the distribution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the distribution */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the distribution (e.g., uniform, normal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the software version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the software version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the software version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hardware" (
  "hardware_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hardware configuration */,
  "cpu" TEXT /* CPU model used for testing */,
  "memory" TEXT /* Memory configuration used for testing */,
  "swap" TEXT /* Swap configuration used for testing */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating system used for testing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hardware_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_hardware" (
  "test_hardware_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the test-hardware association */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "hardware_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hardware configuration */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Test environment (e.g., local, cloud, container) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_hardware_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_hardware_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_hardware_hardware_id FOREIGN KEY ("hardware_id") REFERENCES hardware ("hardware_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., QA engineer, developer, project manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., QA, development, management) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test executed */,
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coverage metric */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the step in the testing process */,
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the distribution index */,
  "cpu_time" REAL /* CPU time used by the test in seconds */,
  "max_memory" REAL /* Maximum memory usage by the test in MB */,
  "time_taken" REAL /* Time taken to execute the test in seconds */,
  "max_swap" INTEGER /* Maximum swap usage by the test in KB */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the test execution */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the test execution */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test execution (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the test execution failed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_history_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES steps ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_history_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_history_distribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("distribution_id") REFERENCES distributions ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_history_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_history_coverage_id FOREIGN KEY ("coverage_id") REFERENCES coverage ("coverage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test to be run */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software version to be tested */,
  "hardware_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hardware configuration to be used */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the test run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the test run */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the test run (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_schedules_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_schedules_hardware_id FOREIGN KEY ("hardware_id") REFERENCES hardware ("hardware_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_schedules_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test executed */,
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coverage metric */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the step in the testing process */,
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the distribution index */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., error, warning, info) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES steps ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_coverage_id FOREIGN KEY ("coverage_id") REFERENCES coverage ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_distribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("distribution_id") REFERENCES distributions ("distribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test executed */,
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coverage metric */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the step in the testing process */,
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the distribution index */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_message" TEXT /* Message for the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_distribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("distribution_id") REFERENCES distributions ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_coverage_id FOREIGN KEY ("coverage_id") REFERENCES coverage ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES steps ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)
